title: PilotMetadataCheckpointCostEndpoint
description: Cost-source-aware shape of one completed cost endpoint inside the ignored pilot metadata checkpoint. Provider costs carry only value/completed_at/response_hash (cost_source unset or 'provider_response'); derived costs additionally carry conservative and provenance fields. Legacy checkpoints without these fields remain readable and load as provider costs.

value.description: Provider or derived cost as returned/derived (decimal string for derived).

cost_source.description: Unset/null is interpreted as a provider get_cost result.

conservative_cost_usd.description: Derived raw x 1.25; equals raw for provider costs.

derivation_hash.description: Immutable estimate hash binding every derived provenance input.
